statement: Out-of-mandate agent records are RECORDED AND FLAGGED, never silently rejected; flagged records carry zero weight (no trust, consensus, or reputation effect). A truth ledger records what happened, including violations — rejection blinds the victim.
status_note_2026_07_11: Shipped status: v0 is observational — out-of-mandate acts are recorded and flagged (crates/elara-verify/src/mandate.rs); the zero-weight consensus enforcement described above is design intent, staged as a later, separately-audited slice. This note distinguishes the decided design from what is currently wired into consensus.
